title: Jimmy Butler Discusses Recovery From ACL Surgery, Hopes To Stay With Warriors

title: Reports: Celtics re-sign Ron Harper Jr. to long-term extension
summary: Former Two-Way guard Ron Harper Jr. reportedly signs three-year extension to remain with Celtics.

title: Report: Thunder re-sign Isaiah Hartenstein through 2028-29 season
summary: Friday night, reports emerged that Oklahoma City has agreed to a fresh 3-year contract extension with center Isaiah Hartenstein.

summary: The Brooklyn native will reportedly return to the New York Knicks on a multiyear contract.

title: NBA unveils 2026 NBA Summer League Schedule
summary: The annual summer showcase featuring all 30 teams will once again take place on the UNLV campus.

title: Reports: Thunder trade Isaiah Joe to Pistons for picks
summary: The Pistons add 3-point shooting by picking up Thunder swingman Isaiah Joe from the Thunder.

title: AJ Dybantsa arrives in Washington, ready to work on turning Wizards around
summary: The former BYU star was the Wizards' first No. 1 overall pick since John Wall in 2010.

title: Bucks look to rookies Brayden Burries, Nate Ament to spark their post-Giannis rebuild
summary: The progress of the duo is pivotal to the rebuilding process of a franchise that hasn’t gotten much production since 2013.

title: Report: Mark Williams plans to sign 3-year deal with Suns

title: New coach Micah Nori says Trail Blazers will play hard, smart and together
